Parametro utm_source dalla pagina di att: utm_source parameter from the landing page
Termini da motori di ricerca o parametri: Terms from search engines or ?q= parameters on the page
URL di destinazione; provenienza = primo: Destination URL; source = first referrer of the session (same as events)
Descrizione in dashboard e tag inviato c: Dashboard description and tag sent with indiestats.track (same value as the string in the code).
Volte e visitatori nella tabella: intero: Counts and visitors in the table: entire period above, without analytics filters.
Tutti i tag inviati con indiestats.track: All tags sent with indiestats.track in the period
Singole occorrenze nel periodo; payload: Individual occurrences in the period; payload stored and sanitized server-side (server pagination)

Verifica il tuo indirizzo email per pote: Verify your email address to update your password and manage 2FA.
Verifica il tuo indirizzo email per atti: Verify your email address to enable or manage 2FA.
Attiva 2FA per richiedere un codice dall: Enable 2FA to require a code from your authenticator app at login.
Il login richiederà un codice dalla tua: Login will require a code from your authenticator app.
I codici sono salvati solo in questa sch: Codes are only saved on this screen: they are hidden for security. Regenerate to view new ones.
Inserisci la password per eliminare defi: Enter your password to permanently delete your account.
GeoLite2 Country resolves visitor countr: GeoLite2 Country resolves visitor countries from IP addresses. MaxMind offers a free GeoLite2 database; you need a free account and a license key.
and confirm your email if required.
In the MaxMind portal, open “My License: In the MaxMind portal, open “My License Key” and generate a key for GeoLite2 downloads (you can answer “No” to GeoIP Update if you only use this app).
Paste the key below and save, then click: Paste the key below and save, then click “Download or update database”.
The file is stored on the server; the sc: The file is stored on the server; the scheduler also runs :command weekly (with cron configured).
GeoIP database file is not installed yet: GeoIP database file is not installed yet. Save a license key and download, or set GEOIP_DATABASE to an existing .mmdb path.
A license key is saved (hidden). Leave t: A license key is saved (hidden). Leave the field empty to keep it.
Optional: set GEOIP_MAXMIND_LICENSE_KEY: Optional: set GEOIP_MAXMIND_LICENSE_KEY or GEOIP_DATABASE in .env for deployments without using this form.
No GeoIP license key is configured. Save: No GeoIP license key is configured. Save a key above or set GEOIP_MAXMIND_LICENSE_KEY in .env.
